name: io.github.nestebe/pocketbase-mcp
title: PocketBase MCP
description: Complete MCP server for PocketBase — collections, records, auth, files, logs, settings, backups and crons.

environmentVariables.name: POCKETBASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the PocketBase instance, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8090

environmentVariables.name: POCKETBASE_ADMIN_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Superuser email used to authenticate against PocketBase

environmentVariables.name: POCKETBASE_ADMIN_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Superuser password used to authenticate against PocketBase
